title: Optimi
description: A client-side mod-pack that makes minecraft, like a new game
body:
![Banner showing the optimi modpack UI and "Optimi" written behind it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7d7250a524e2f8b2cff41a48128ddbc3eb078f8_0.webp)

**Optimi Modpack** is a Minecraft modpack focused on improving the player experience by for example adding a custom simpler UI with no junk like the splash textes meanwhile adding features like shader/resourcepack downloader or in-game chat system.

![Features Section](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce7dc4b4b82d2ae7ab3b5df8afbd708d62a34499.png)

- **Custom Shaderpack/Resourcepack downloader** - download your resourcepacks in game without modrinth or any other websites¹
- **In-game chat** - Chat in game, why do you need discord if you have this?²³
- **Simpler UI** - No "Made by Notch" splash textes were harmed, since they are useless anyways

![System requierments section](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be3b65e344511dfa0021200c78b77ccfb9bb2982.png)

- CPU: Anything(but please no ARM for the love of torvalds)
- RAM: 4GB minimum (6GB+ recommended for best experience)
- GPU: Any that supports OpenGL 2.1+ and that doesnt sag
- OS: Windows 10+, Debian Linux 12+, Fedora 41+, Arch Linux, even FreeBSD
- 
![Copyright NaChlorid 2024-2026](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8485a386584fcbf4b868a366da98ac533e4d3662.png)
